vendorRecommendations.jquery-ui: jQuery UI 1.12.x or older can have its own CVEs and compatibility warnings. Prefer 1.13.2+ when possible; otherwise test datepicker, dialog, button, tabs, and autocomplete under jQuery Migrate.
vendorRecommendations.jqgrid: Do not hand-edit minified grid code. For classic jqGrid 4.x, test rendering, paging, sort, search, inline edit, formatter, and subgrid under Migrate; plan a maintained jqGrid-compatible replacement if it breaks.
vendorRecommendations.select2: Select2 4.x is the practical target for jQuery 3.x compatibility. Test placeholder, ajax search, multiple select, and initial value binding.
vendorRecommendations.autoNumeric: Old autoNumeric 1.x may work under jQuery 3.x, but should be verified. Test amount input, formatting, blur/focus, saved value, readonly, and disabled states.
vendorRecommendations.datepicker: Test open/close, locale, min/max date, keyboard entry, and readonly/disabled behavior under jQuery 3.x.
vendorRecommendations.bootstrap: Check Bootstrap JS version against jQuery 3.x compatibility and test modal, dropdown, tooltip, tab, and collapse.
vendorRecommendations.jquery-validate: Test validation trigger timing, message rendering, submit blocking, remote validation, and reset behavior.
vendorRecommendations.jquery-core: Core library file; replace by patch-jquery mode or by explicit profile jquery.newJquerySrc.
vendorRecommendations.jquery-migrate: Compatibility bridge. Keep during transition, collect warnings, and remove only after the warning budget is closed.
vendorRecommendations.vendor-other: External library. Verify jQuery 3.x compatibility by version/vendor docs or runtime testing before editing.
